samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">First operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">Second operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal for selecting the operation to be performed.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Indicates whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">Indicates whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">Indicates whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Indicates whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">General flag, set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="ADD">6'b100000</constant>
        <constant id="ADDU">6'b100001</constant>
        <constant id="SUB">6'b100010</constant>
        <constant id="SUBU">6'b100011</constant>
        <constant id="AND">6'b100100</constant>
        <constant id="OR">6'b100101</constant>
        <constant id="XOR">6'b100110</constant>
        <constant id="NOR">6'b100111</constant>
        <constant id="SLT">6'b101010</constant>
        <constant id="SLTU">6'b101011</constant>
        <constant id="SLL">6'b000000</constant>
        <constant id="SRL">6'b000010</constant>
        <constant id="SRA">6'b000011</constant>
        <constant id="SLLV">6'b000100</constant>
        <constant id="SRLV">6'b000110</constant>
        <constant id="SRAV">6'b000111</constant>
        <constant id="LUI">6'b001111</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="r" expression="res[31:0]" />
        <assign id="zero" expression="(r == 32'h00000000)" />
        <assign id="carry" expression="res[32]" />
        <assign id="negative" expression="r[31]" />
        <assign id="overflow" expression="((a[31] ^ b[31]) & ~(a[31] ^ res[31]))" />
        <assign id="flag" expression="((aluc == SLT) | (aluc == SLTU)) ? 1 : z" />
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Define the control signals for each operation
        localparam ADD = 6'b100000;
        localparam ADDU = 6'b100001;
        localparam SUB = 6'b100010;
        localparam SUBU = 6'b100011;
        localparam AND = 6'b100100;
        localparam OR = 6'b100101;
        localparam XOR = 6'b100110;
        localparam NOR = 6'b100111;
        localparam SLT = 6'b101010;
        localparam SLTU = 6'b101011;
        localparam SLL = 6'b000000;
        localparam SRL = 6'b000010;
        localparam SRA = 6'b000011;
        localparam SLLV = 6'b000100;
        localparam SRLV = 6'b000110;
        localparam SRAV = 6'b000111;
        localparam LUI = 6'b001111;
        
        // Declare the inputs and outputs
        input [31:0] a, b;
        input [5:0] aluc;
        output reg [31:0] r;
        output reg zero, carry, negative, overflow, flag;
        
        // Declare the temporary variables
        reg [31:0] temp_a, temp_b, res;
        reg [4:0] shift_amount;
        
        // Assign the inputs to the temporary variables
        assign temp_a = $signed(a);
        assign temp_b = $signed(b);
        
        // Perform the selected operation based on the control signal
        always @(*) begin
            case(aluc)
                ADD: res <= temp_a + temp_b;
                ADDU: res <= a + b;
                SUB: res <= temp_a - temp_b;
                SUBU: res <= a - b;
                AND: res <= temp_a & temp_b;
                OR: res <= temp_a | temp_b;
                XOR: res <= temp_a ^ temp_b;
                NOR: res <= ~(temp_a | temp_b);
                SLT: res <= {31'd0, (temp_a < temp_b)};
                SLTU: res <= {31'd0, (a < b)};
                SLL: shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                SRL: shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                SRA: shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                SLLV: shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                SRLV: shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                SRAV: shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                LUI: res <= {a[15:0], 16'd0};
                default: res <= 32'bz;
            endcase
            
            // Check for overflow condition
            if ((a[31] ^ b[31]) && !(a[31] ^ res[31]))
                overflow <= 1;
            else
                overflow <= 0;
            
            // Set the flag output based on the selected operation
            if (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU)
                flag <= 1;
            else
                flag <= 0;
        end
        
        // Assign the result to the output port
        assign r = res[31:0];
    </implementation>
</module>
